domain: Yemeni terraced agriculture (Sana'a UNESCO World Heritage region): mountain-side terraces 500+ years old; rain-fed cisterns at top + gravity downflow across terraces; per-tree directional water valve in dry winter; tree-canopy shade + altitude-gradient (2200m); cistern-cascade retains against semi-arid runoff; Al-Sanani coffee variety endemic
specific_mechanism: YEMENI-TERRACE-GRAVITY-CASCADE-CISTERN-PER-TREE-VALVE-INFOFLOW: gravity-cascade information-flow with (1) top-tier rain-fed cistern T_top: input embedding accumulates 'rainfall' (raw input) in capacity-constrained top-tier reservoir; (2) K-tier gravity downflow: information flows down K stacked terraces; per-tier capacity throttle T_k constrains downflow rate; lower tiers receive only what upper tiers passed; (3) per-token directional valve V_token: in dry-winter regime (low-context), router decides per-token where downflow goes (specific downstream head/cluster); in wet-summer regime (high-context), default broadcast; (4) altitude-gradient layer temperature τ_l = T_max - α·l: layer-l temperature decreases with depth (mountain altitude gradient) controlling sampling spread; (5) retention-against-runoff regularizer L_retain: penalty on information loss past a layer forces per-tier retention. Differs from R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW (multi-stage cistern context-buffer chamber stacked + wind-tower thermal-attention damping cool-reference cross-attention + vent-shaft per-stage diagnostic-readout layer-norm injection + sarooj impermeable buffer-boundary controlled-outlet, no top-tier capacity-constrained cistern + no per-token directional valve dry-wet regime + no altitude-gradient layer temperature + no retention regularizer) and R530 KHIPU-PRIMARY-PENDANT-SUBSIDIARY-CASCADE-DECIMAL (4-tier khipu + 3-knot classification + decimal scaling + correction loop + cord-attribute metadata, no gravity-cascade + no per-tier capacity throttle + no directional valve + no altitude-gradient + no retention) by gravity-downflow top-cistern + K-tier capacity throttle + per-token directional valve dry-vs-wet regime + altitude-gradient layer temperature + retention-against-runoff regularizer.
llm_application: YEMENI-TERRACE-GRAVITY-CASCADE-CISTERN-PER-TREE-VALVE-INFOFLOW gravity-cascade information-flow + top-tier rain-fed cistern T_top capacity-constrained input embedding reservoir + K-tier gravity downflow + per-tier capacity throttle T_k + per-token directional valve V_token dry-winter-vs-wet-summer regime + altitude-gradient layer temperature τ_l = T_max - α·l + retention-against-runoff regularizer L_retain. Differs from R413. R422. R429. R438. R455. R480. R493. R505 KASHAN-QANAT (closest — cistern-buffer + wind-tower + vent-shaft + sarooj). R530 KHIPU. Differs from Dynamic Routing + Unified Cascade-Routing + C3PO + Cascaded LM by gravity-cascade + per-tier capacity + directional valve + altitude-gradient + retention. Differs by GRAVITY-CASCADE TOP-CISTERN + K-TIER CAPACITY THROTTLE + PER-TOKEN DIRECTIONAL VALVE DRY-WET REGIME + ALTITUDE-GRADIENT LAYER TEMPERATURE + RETENTION-AGAINST-RUNOFF REGULARIZER.
novelty_claim: Dynamic Routing Cascading 2603.04445 + Unified Cascade-Routing + C3PO 2511.07396 + Cascaded LM 2506.11887 cover multi-tier cascade-routing + cost-constrained space. YEMENI-TERRACE-GRAVITY-CASCADE-CISTERN-PER-TREE-VALVE-INFOFLOW adds (a) top-tier rain-fed cistern + (b) per-tier capacity throttle + (c) per-token directional valve dry-wet regime + (d) altitude-gradient layer temperature + (e) retention-against-runoff regularizer. Recombination — borderline lookup.
